goal: closed_under_countable_union_constraint[K](m.is_measurable) = forall(x0: Nat -> Set[K]) { forall(x1: Nat) { m.is_measurable(x0(x1)) } implies m.is_measurable(indexed_union[K, Nat](x0)) }
